calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq.  Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Aug-03-2011 is admitted to probate. Marsha Cheung Golangco, Eric Yiu Tong Cheung, and Mary Mui Ling Lau are appointed Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing on filing of petition for order for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration is set for Nov-15-2027.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Continued To Apr-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
